title: GDevelop: Open-Source Merge Rush
objective: Survive a 2-4 minute maintainer sprint by catching valid open-source drops, avoiding decoys, and riding combo windows to post the highest leaderboard score offline or online later.

controls.input: Drag left or right with one thumb along the bottom lane
controls.outcome: Moves the repo basket under falling drops for catches or evasions

controls.input: Tap left or right side of the screen
controls.outcome: Jumps the basket one lane for fast saves on narrow patterns

controls.input: Watch the large badge above the basket
controls.outcome: Tells you which drop type currently extends combo and which one breaks it

steps: Open-source assets, code commits, bugfix gears, and GDevelop engine parts fall from the top in three to five lanes.
Catch the currently approved open-source drops to build combo and multiplier.
Avoid closed-source padlocks, broken plugins, and fake fork crates; three bad catches or misses end the run.
Every few seconds a big branch banner flips the rule between BUILD mode and REVIEW mode.
In BUILD mode, catch green commits and engine parts freely; in REVIEW mode, only catch items stamped with the matching open-source license,s
The twist: during each branch flip, one decoy briefly becomes valuable if it lands immediately after its matching commit, creating a risky 2
Audio cues signal safe catches, combo tiers, and upcoming branch flips so the game works well on mobile without constant text reading.
scoring: Each clean catch scores points; consecutive valid catches increase a combo multiplier up to x8. During branch-flip windows, catching a matching commit-then-fork pair grants a short 'Merge Bonus' burst worth extra points.
tips: Keep your thumb low and make short drags; lane snaps are safer than chasing every drop.
Listen for the branch-flip sting; the correct target rule changes before the banner fully lands.
Skip risky edge drops when your combo is high; survival usually beats one greedy catch.
Use REVIEW mode to hunt the bonus pair only when the basket is already centered.

trendContext.title: GDevelop 🎮 Open-source, cross-platform 2D/3D/multiplayer game engine designed for everyone.
